title: lotoxalis neaei
intro: Lotoxalis neaei, also known as the yellow water lily or American water lily, is a flowering plant species native to North America. The medicinal properties of Lotoxalis neaei are attributed to its roots, which contain alkaloids and saponins with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include treating skin conditions, wounds, and fever, as well as providing relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lotoxalis neaei are typically made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
